summary: M.S. in Artificial Intelligence from Illinois Institute of Technology (graduating May 2026) with production experience building generative AI interfaces and full-stack applications. Shipped a real-time AI interview platform with conversational AI, knowledge base ingestion, and multi-turn workspace context using Next.js, TypeScript, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL on AWS, and a production RAG developer assistant with vector search, embeddings, and LangChain. Proficient in Python and TypeScript across the full stack, actively use AI-augmented coding tools including Claude Code, and experienced collaborating with cross-functional teams to ship AI-driven product features.

skills.languages: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL, Go, Java (familiar), C++ (familiar)
skills.ml: LLMs, Generative AI, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), LangChain, Vector Embeddings, OpenAI API, Anthropic Claude API, Prompt Engineering, NLP, HuggingFace Transformers, Semantic Search, Agentic Workflows
skills.infra: FastAPI, Node.js, Express.js, RESTful APIs, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), PostgreSQL, Supabase, Pinecone, Railway, Vercel, Git
